purchase.description: Acquisition of Tech Startup Ltd - working capital and expansion

sof_explanation:
The funds for this £1,050,000 acquisition come from multiple sources:

1. INHERITANCE (£250,000): I inherited £250,000 from my late grandmother, Mrs. Elizabeth Johnson, who passed away in May 2023. The probate was granted in June 2023, and funds were transferred to my Barclays account on June 15, 2023.

2. PROPERTY SALE (£300,000): I sold my residential property at 123 High Street, London, SW1A 1AA in July 2023. The property was sold for £300,000 and completion occurred on July 20, 2023. The sale proceeds were paid into my HSBC account.

3. BUSINESS LOAN (£150,000): I secured a business loan of £150,000 from NatWest Bank in January 2024. The loan was approved on January 10, 2024, and funds were transferred to my business account on January 15, 2024.

4. BUSINESS SALE (£200,000): I sold my previous business, 'Digital Solutions Ltd', to TechCorp PLC in January 2023 for £200,000. The sale completed in January 2023 and proceeds were paid to my Lloyds business account.

5. SAVINGS (£50,000): I have accumulated £50,000 in savings from my salary over the past 5 years. These funds are held in my Santander savings account.

6. GIFT (£100,000): I received a gift of £100,000 from my parents, Mr. and Mrs. David Thompson, in February 2024 to help with the business acquisition. The gift was transferred directly to my business account on February 10, 2024.

All these funds have been consolidated and are ready for the acquisition payment.
known_documents: Probate grant for Elizabeth Johnson estate
Property completion statement for 123 High Street
Business sale agreement for Digital Solutions Ltd
